title: Vanimals
description: Vanimals adds vanilla friendly animals to your Minecraft world.
body:
this is...

  ![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a374c7e7c31e3797feb3a98749416d7cf96d8dab.png)
  
**( ALPHA VERSION! )**

## **Behold the nature on a new perspective!**
 
![bisons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d85b6e5054ca9592e5ebfaf97774f9db493232ef.png)

Adding a lot of new mechanics and fun animals to your Overworld!

You can tame, ride, explore, hunt and create your own adventure with the animals on this experience!

Are you ready?

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## Content:
**Bison:**
A heavy and slow animal, useful for farms and as a battle mount.
- Spawns in Snowy Plains & Plains.
- You can ride it equipping a saddle and control it with "Apple on a Stick".
- Once you riding it, u can press "ctrl" key to sprint and deal damage to entities on your way!
- Nametags hang on the ear like cows IRL.
- When these animals are aggresive are slow but can ram at you and deal crazy damage.
- Can be stunned with blocking ram with shield.
- Drops its meat and also "Bison Horns", used for bonemeal.
- Female can be milked.
- Male can be shreaded.

**Napoleon Fish:**
A big and beautiful animal, carries the corals ecosystems.
- Spawns in Warm Oceans
- They eat dead corals
- Females are smaller and with different colors.
- Males are bigger, more blue colored and have a hump above their eyes.
- They still do nothing for now, sorry.

**Mudskipper:**
An useful and funny companion, works like a backpack!
- Spawns in Mangrove Swamps.
- Eats Spider eyes.
- Dance near a Jukeboc with music.
- Amphibious behaviour, aside its a fish.
- Can be tamed with "Four-Eyed Fish Eye".
- Can be ordered to sit and wander.
- Has a custom inventory with four slots.
- It can be bucketed, it will still hold the items on its inventory!

**Four-Eyed Fish:**
A curious habitant of Rivers and Mangroves, useful for the taming of Mudskipper.
- Spawns in Rivers and Mangrove Swamps.
- It has a Mangrove variant.
- Eats Spider Eyes.
- Can be sheared to obtain the "Four-Eyed Fish Eye", they will grow again dont worry.
- Swims near the water surface.
- It doesnt has differendces between genders
- SPECIAL NAMETAG: Kokushibo!

</details>
